name: The Bridge Troll
description: A massive shape hauls itself from beneath the old stone bridge, water streaming from mossy shoulders. The troll blinks in the sunlight and bares a mouthful of blunt teeth, its voice a wet rumble demanding tribute — or a fight.
failureConsequence: The troll hurls you into the river with a contemptuous swat. You wash up downstream, bruised and soggy, and must find another crossing.
